name: RaceIQ F2
summary: Sprint, feature-race, and championship forecasts for FIA Formula 2.
description: A purpose-built spec-series model: a leakage-safe driver-skill blend (Elo with rookie pooling + finishing history) routed through two race-type heads — a merit feature race and a reverse-grid sprint — with Monte Carlo win/podium probabilities, finishing-range intervals, a sprint+feature-aware championship projection, forward-eval, and drift/promotion monitoring. Full website with per-round sprint/feature detail, head-to-head matrices, and an accuracy dashboard. ~75% reuses MotorsportVerse core. Phase 1 runs on a reproducible synthetic source; a live F2 feed lands in Phase 2.
